title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Latest Trends on fuel transition, shipyard actions, government, ports, financing and industry players
Today, shipping companies should look at carbon strategies - compulsory and voluntary - as impactful legislation is fast approaching. Read More

"Taste of spring"
Wintertime in Greece, much like in the spot market, can be harsher than expected, with low temperatures and cloudy skies. Read More

Best candidates to lead the next bull market
Last week saw more persistent than expected inflation and very strong January retail sales in the US.
